title: Beat the Piano
shortDescription: A rhythm game where hitting the right keys actually plays a real piano composition.
fullDescription: A Unity rhythm/music game for PC. Blocks arrive at the right side of the screen and you press your keyboard keys in time — get it right and you're actually playing real piano compositions, not just scoring points. Multiple levels, each built around a different piece of music.

title: SAMT: All Stars
shortDescription: A 2D fighting game inspired by Brawlhalla, built with a team — playable characters based on us.
fullDescription: A group project: a 2D fighting game inspired by Brawlhalla, with a full combat system and playable characters modeled on the team itself. Ivan's role was developer.

title: Parserize
statusNote: parserize.site is currently offline — hosted on GitHub Pages, cause unknown.
shortDescription: Finds local businesses with no website or a bad one, so you can pitch them a new one.
fullDescription: A lead-generation tool for web developers and freelancers. Pick a point on a map, set a search radius and a business type, and Parserize returns local businesses that either don't have a website or have a poor one — ready to reach out to and pitch a build.

title: Reflux
statusNote: Paused for now — will return to this when time allows.
shortDescription: An optimized, low-overhead livestreaming tool for streaming to a friend.
fullDescription: A tool for lightweight, optimized livestreaming to a friend — Discord-style use case, but focused purely on efficient streaming rather than a full chat platform. Put in many hours on this one, including with Claude, but hit a wall getting it fully working. On the back burner for now.
